channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Data Center Predictions for 2025
item.description: Get ready for a year of change in the data center world with our expert predictions on tech tariffs, AI adoption, power consumption, and more.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The future of open source will be messy
item.description: Open Source Initiative (OSI) chief Stefano Maffulli says Meta is “bullying” the industry on the concept of open source. The Economist more colorfully characterizes the dispute as “bare-it-all purists … confronting Meta, the social-media giant controlled by a mankini-clad Mark Zuckerberg.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: These glasses let you 'see' conversations in real time
item.description: When I heard about AI glasses that let you "see" what people are saying, I was skeptical. But after trying them on, I was proven wrong.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump weighs in on H-1B debate, backs immigration visas
item.description: “I’ve always liked the visas, I have always been in favor of the visas. That’s why we have them,” Trump said in a phone interview with The New York Post published Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: How the H1-B visa is causing strife within Trump’s coalition
item.description: An online spat between factions of Donald Trump’s supporters over immigration and the tech industry has thrown internal divisions in his political movement into public display, previewing the fissures and contradictory views his coalition could bring to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Scammers are targeting teens with these nasty tricks
item.description: Cybercriminals have more ways than ever to target teenagers; here are some of the most widespread scams and tricks to watch in order to keep your loved ones safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI-powered robot sinks seemingly impossible basketball hoops
item.description: A humanoid robot named CUE6 has got game. The basketball-playing robot, produced by Toyota, claimed a Guinness World Record for longest shot.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2024 review: ‘Typhoons’ bookend busy year in cyber
item.description: From Volt Typhoon to Salt Typhoon, major cyber incidents in 2024 shined a spotlight on how agencies are managing cyber threats to critical infrastructure. The post 2024 review: ‘Typhoons’ bookend busy year in cyber first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network
